app_info.subtitle: Search public wiki memory
app_info.description: Kinic Wiki helps users discover public wiki databases, search public knowledge nodes, read task-focused context, and inspect source evidence from ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists and ranks public database metadata without modifying any database.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only searches public wiki node indexes and returns matching result metadata.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads one public wiki node identified by an opaque search result id.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads public wiki nodes identified by opaque search result ids and returns item-level errors.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads one public wiki node at a known VFS path.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads up to ten public wiki nodes at known VFS paths and returns item-level errors.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists public wiki node inventory under a prefix without returning node content.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves public Store API roots, capabilities, roles, and limits for one database.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves task-scoped public wiki context, graph links, search hits, and source evidence.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves source reference metadata for one known public knowledge node path.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Discover the public wiki database relevant to a knowledge task.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find a public Kinic Wiki database about agent memory workflows.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching public database metadata with names, descriptions, tags, URLs, and ranking scores.

test_cases.description: Answer a normal question from task-scoped wiki context.
test_cases.user_prompt: Using the Kinic Wiki database I selected, summarize what the project says about source evidence.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns an answer grounded in public context nodes and notes whether the returned context was truncated.

test_cases.description: Search broadly and fetch multiple candidate nodes for evidence review.
test_cases.user_prompt: Search this public wiki for clipper usage notes and read the strongest candidates.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns search candidates, reads selected public nodes, and reports any item-level errors or truncation.

test_cases.description: List a database prefix and batch-read known paths.
test_cases.user_prompt: List the top-level public wiki inventory, then read these two known Knowledge paths together.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns node inventory without content, then returns public node bodies for known paths with batch metadata.

test_cases.description: Inspect source evidence for a known knowledge node.
test_cases.user_prompt: For this known Knowledge node path, show the source evidence references and read the node text.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns source reference metadata and the requested public node text for the known path.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for write or delete requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete this wiki node and replace it with my edited version.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it only supports anonymous read-only public wiki access.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for private database or credential requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Use my private credentials to open a non-public Kinic Wiki database.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because private access and credentials are outside its supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated personal productivity data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow and who should I email afterward?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar and email workflows are outside its scope.
